# Transcrição: 03. Your Second Challenge

- **Fonte:** 03. Your Second Challenge
- **Duração:** 00:40
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 00:40]

Okay, so the second challenge I'm setting out for you is to set up your prospecting pipeline. Remember to choose something that's based off what you're very competent at and your own strengths. Once you have that, make sure you try to dedicate about 30% of your time in your business to prospecting. It's really important that you don't just focus on implementation or on the business side, but you're also dedicating that time towards bringing in those leads and those clients. Once you get your first two leads from your pipeline, tell us in the group, tag us in the comments, and we've got a little surprise for you.
